# Glood.AI: AI-Powered Commerce Solutions

## Docs

- [Changelog](https://docs.glood.ai/ai-image-video-editor/changelog.md): Release notes and updates for Glood AI Image & Video Editor
- [FAQ](https://docs.glood.ai/ai-image-video-editor/faq.md): Frequently asked questions about Glood AI Image & Video Editor
- [Get Started](https://docs.glood.ai/ai-image-video-editor/get-started.md): Get started with Glood AI Image & Video Editor
- [AI Image & Video Editor](https://docs.glood.ai/ai-image-video-editor/index.md): Intelligent image and video editing for Shopify stores
- [Changelog](https://docs.glood.ai/ai-search-merchandising/changelog.md): Release notes and updates for Glood AI Search & Merchandising
- [FAQ](https://docs.glood.ai/ai-search-merchandising/faq.md): Frequently asked questions about Glood AI Search & Merchandising
- [Get Started](https://docs.glood.ai/ai-search-merchandising/get-started.md): Get started with Glood AI Search & Merchandising
- [AI Search & Merchandising](https://docs.glood.ai/ai-search-merchandising/index.md): Intelligent search and merchandising for Shopify stores
- [API reference](https://docs.glood.ai/api-reference/introduction.md): Integrate Glood.AI recommendations and search into any storefront
- [Get Automatic Recommendations](https://docs.glood.ai/api-reference/recommendations/headless/automatic-recommendations.md): Get automatic recommendations powered using LLMs
- [Send Headless Events](https://docs.glood.ai/api-reference/recommendations/headless/events.md): Send tracking events from headless, mobile, or hydrogen storefronts.
- [Headless Init](https://docs.glood.ai/api-reference/recommendations/headless/init.md): Identify a visitor and retrieve shop configuration. Call this once per session before fetching sections or sending events.
- [Get Headless Recommendations using Query](https://docs.glood.ai/api-reference/recommendations/headless/recommendations.md): Get AI recommendations including Manual, Rules, LLM & AI using Query.
- [Get Headless Sections](https://docs.glood.ai/api-reference/recommendations/headless/sections.md): Get recommendation sections with full product details for a given page context.
- [Get Top Recommendations](https://docs.glood.ai/api-reference/recommendations/headless/top-recommendations.md): Fetch products by a ranking strategy (bestsellers, new arrivals, trending) with rich criteria filters, full-text query, cursor pagination, and facet aggregations.
- [Partner APIs](https://docs.glood.ai/api-reference/recommendations/partners/introduction.md): APIs for third-party integrations and partner platforms
- [Search APIs](https://docs.glood.ai/api-reference/search/introduction.md): APIs for AI-powered product search and merchandising
- [Personalized Recommendations](https://docs.glood.ai/features/ai-personalized-recommendations.md): Drive more sales with intelligent product recommendations tailored to each shopper
- [AI Search & Merchandising](https://docs.glood.ai/features/ai-search-merchandising.md): Optimize your store search and product placement with AI-powered merchandising
- [AI Upsell Bundles](https://docs.glood.ai/features/ai-upsell-bundles.md): Boost sales with intelligent product bundles and upsell recommendations
- [Images and Embeds](https://docs.glood.ai/features/checkout-upsell.md): Add image, video, and other HTML elements
- [Navigation](https://docs.glood.ai/features/discounts.md): The navigation field in mint.json defines the pages that go in the navigation menu
- [Upsell Promotions](https://docs.glood.ai/features/upsell-promotions.md): Drive AOV with two new promotion types — Product Upsell (Buy X Get Y) and Free Gift on cart value — surfaced on PDP and in the cart drawer.
- [Default CSS](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/bundles/default-css.md): Default bundle CSS template code reference
- [Default JavaScript](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/bundles/default-js.md): Default bundle JavaScript hooks code reference
- [Default Template](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/bundles/default-template.md): Default bundle Liquid template code reference
- [Hooks](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/bundles/hooks.md): Complete guide to bundle hooks in Glood.AI
- [Introduction](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/bundles/introduction.md): Learn about bundle templates in Glood.AI
- [Settings](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/bundles/settings.md): Default bundle settings configuration reference
- [Translations](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/bundles/translations.md): Default bundle translations reference
- [Default Template CSS](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/default-code/css-liquid.md): Default Template CSS code reference
- [Default Template Javascript](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/default-code/section-js.md): Default Template Javascript code reference
- [Default Template liquid](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/default-code/section-liquid.md): Default Template liquid code reference
- [Default Template Settings](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/default-code/settings-json.md): Default Template Settings configuration reference
- [Default Translations](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/default-code/translations.md): Default translations object reference
- [App Modules](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/glood-hydrogen-sdk/api-reference/app-modules.md): Complete reference for recommendations(), search(), and wishlist() app modules
- [Client API](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/glood-hydrogen-sdk/api-reference/client.md): Complete reference for createGlood() function and GloodClient interface
- [React Components](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/glood-hydrogen-sdk/api-reference/components.md): Complete reference for GloodProvider component and useGloodAnalytics hook
- [Event System](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/glood-hydrogen-sdk/api-reference/event-system.md): Complete guide to event tracking, pixel transmission, and analytics integration
- [TypeScript Types](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/glood-hydrogen-sdk/api-reference/types.md): Complete TypeScript interface definitions for the Glood Hydrogen SDK
- [Utilities](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/glood-hydrogen-sdk/api-reference/utilities.md): Utility functions for consent management, constants, data transformation, and browser context
- [Configuration Guide](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/glood-hydrogen-sdk/configuration.md): Comprehensive guide to configuring the Glood Hydrogen SDK for different use cases and environments
- [Content Security Policy Setup](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/glood-hydrogen-sdk/content-security-policy.md): Configure CSP to enable Glood pixel tracking and event transmission
- [Basic Setup Example](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/glood-hydrogen-sdk/examples/basic-setup.md): Complete example of basic Glood Hydrogen SDK setup with minimal configuration
- [Glood Hydrogen SDK](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/glood-hydrogen-sdk/index.md): Complete guide to integrating Glood with Shopify Hydrogen for e-commerce analytics and personalization
- [Installation Guide](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/glood-hydrogen-sdk/installation.md): Step-by-step guide to install and set up the Glood Hydrogen SDK
- [How to reload mini cart sections using javascript](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/how-to-reload-mini-cart-sections-using-javascript.md)
- [Integrations](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/integrations/introduction.md): Learn about available integrations for Glood.AI recommendations
- [Product Ratings Integration](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/integrations/product-ratings.md): Learn how to integrate product ratings and reviews with Glood.AI recommendations
- [Quick View Integration](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/integrations/quick-view.md): Learn how to integrate quick view functionality with Glood.AI recommendations
- [Wishlist Integration](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/integrations/wishlist.md): Learn how to integrate wishlist functionality with Glood.AI recommendations
- [Developer Guide](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/introduction.md): Advanced integration guide for developers implementing Glood.AI
- [Code](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/section-template/code.md): Learn about the core components of a section template
- [Filters](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/section-template/filters.md): Reference for custom Liquid filters available in section templates
- [Hooks](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/section-template/hooks.md): Complete guide to hooks in Glood.AI section templates
- [Introduction](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/section-template/introduction.md): Learn about section templates in Glood.AI
- [Schemas](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/section-template/schemas.md)
- [Tags](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/section-template/tags.md): Learn about available tags for extending section template functionality
- [Upsell Blocks — Theme Integration & JS Hooks](https://docs.glood.ai/for-developers/upsell-blocks-integration.md): Wire the Glood Upsell PDP and Cart blocks into custom themes, integrate native variant + quantity selectors, and react to selections via the window.Glood.upsell pub/sub bus.
- [Activate Glood.AI](https://docs.glood.ai/get-started/activate-glood-store.md): Enable Glood.AI recommendations on your Shopify store
- [Introduction to Glood.AI](https://docs.glood.ai/get-started/introduction.md): Welcome to Glood.AI - The AI-powered Personalized Recommendation Engine for Shopify Plus stores
- [Checkout Analytics](https://docs.glood.ai/guides/analytics/checkout-analytics.md): Comprehensive guide to checkout upsell performance metrics and optimization
- [Recommendation Analytics](https://docs.glood.ai/guides/analytics/recommendation-analytics.md): Complete guide to understanding recommendation performance metrics and attribution
- [How to Create Bundles](https://docs.glood.ai/guides/bundles/how-to-create-bundle.md)
- [Add Sections to Mini Cart](https://docs.glood.ai/guides/cart-upselling/add-sections-to-mini-cart.md): This guide walks you through the process of adding Glood.AI product recommendations to your store's mini cart (also known as AJAX cart).

- [How to create Recent Launch section](https://docs.glood.ai/guides/create-sections/how-to-create-recent-launch-section.md)
- [How to create Recently Viewed section](https://docs.glood.ai/guides/create-sections/how-to-create-recently-viewed-section.md)
- [How to create Similar Products Section](https://docs.glood.ai/guides/create-sections/how-to-create-similar-products-section.md)
- [How to create Slot Based Recommendation section](https://docs.glood.ai/guides/create-sections/how-to-create-slot-based-recommendation-section.md)

- [Enable Labels on Store](https://docs.glood.ai/guides/customization/enable-labels.md): Learn how to configure and enable product labels in your store

- [Glood Frequently Bought Together (FBT)](https://docs.glood.ai/how-it-works/recommendations/bought-together.md): How Glood.AI discovers and manages product bundles to maximize cart value

- [CCPA Compliance](https://docs.glood.ai/legal/ccpa-compliance.md): Learn how Glood.AI protects your privacy while powering personalization in compliance with CCPA

- [GDPR Compliance](https://docs.glood.ai/legal/gdpr-compliance.md): Understanding how Glood.AI protects European users' data and ensures GDPR compliance
